---
title: "Chapter 1 Hurricane NOLA CAREER"
author: "Connor Whalen"
date: "2025-02-18"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: readable
    highlight: textmate
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 3
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

# Introduction
This file contains all code pertaining to the CAREER project in NOLA's hurricane analysis. 

# Setup
#### Install packages.
```{r package install, eval=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
install.packages("tidyverse")
install.packages("janitor")
install.packages("ggeffects")
install.packages("ggpubr")
install.packages("glmmTMB")
install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("johannesbjork/LaCroixColoR")
install.packages("patchwork")
install.packages("ggh4x")
install.packages("vistime")
install.packages("DHARMa")
install.packages("bbmle")
install.packages("reghelper")
install.packages("fuzzyjoin")
```

#### Load packages.
```{r package load, echo=FALSE}
library(ggpubr) 
library(ggeffects)
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(dbplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(glmmTMB)
library(lme4)
library(patchwork)
library(ggh4x)
library(vistime)
library(car)
library(DHARMa)
library(sjPlot)
library(performance)
library(parameters)
library(tidyverse)
library(corrplot)
library(bbmle) 
library(lmtest)
library(purrr)
library(vegan)
library(reghelper)
library(fuzzyjoin)
```
#### Set up aesthetic for plots
```{r}
# color palette -- hurricane = #CB87B4, control = #F4B95A, drought = #D84D16, flood = #1BB6AF
# trem = #c9ad79 , meta = #F66387 , mono = #A6E000 , myxo = #07c4c5
connor_theme <- theme(legend.position = "top", 
        legend.title = element_text(size = 18),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "white"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "lines"),
        panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 8, color = "grey30"),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.2, color = "darkgrey"))
```

#### Load full datasets (parasites collected and NOAA SPI precipitation data) and prep data for analysis
```{r datasets and dataframe loading and general df clean and prep for analysis, echo=FALSE}
full_data <- read.csv("~/Desktop/UW/TUBRI/data/processed/Full_dataset_physical_2024.09.25.csv") %>% 
  janitor::clean_names()

SPI_data <- read.csv("~/Desktop/UW/Chapter1 NOLA/datasets/SPI data - Sheet1.csv") %>% 
  janitor::clean_names()

# Prep all data for analysis, inclduing assigning parasite type categories, abundance and prevalence counts, and establishing correct column date structure
full_data <- full_data %>%
  mutate(psite_type = case_when(
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "ACAN") ~ "acanthocephalan",
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "ACANTH") ~ "acanthocephalan",
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "CEST") ~ "cestode",
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "CILI") ~ "ciliate",
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "COPE") ~ "copepod",
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "LEECH") ~ "leech",
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "META") ~ "trematode_metacercaria",
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "MONO") ~ "monogenean",
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "MYX") ~ "myxozoan",
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "MYXO") ~ "myxozoan",
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "NEM") ~ "nematode",
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "NMORPH") ~ "nematomorph",
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "TREM") ~ "trematode",
    TRUE ~ NA
  ))

full_data <- full_data %>%
  mutate(psite_abundance = case_when(
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "ACAN") ~ psite_count,
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "ACANTH") ~ psite_count,
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "CEST") ~ psite_count,
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "CILI") ~ psite_count,
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "COPE") ~ psite_count,
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "LEECH") ~ psite_count,
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "META") ~ psite_count,
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "MONO") ~ psite_count,
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "NEM") ~ psite_count,
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "NMORPH") ~ psite_count,
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "TREM") ~ psite_count,
    TRUE ~ NA
  ))

full_data <- full_data %>%
  mutate(psite_prevalence = case_when(
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "MYX") ~ psite_count,
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "MYXO") ~ psite_count,
    TRUE ~ NA
  ))

# change fish names to shorthand
full_data <- full_data %>%
  mutate(fish_sp_x = case_when(
    fish_sp_x == "Gambusia affinis" ~ "gamaff",
    fish_sp_x == "Pimephales vigilax" ~ "pimvig",
    fish_sp_x == "Percina vigil" ~ "pervig",
    fish_sp_x == "Carpiodes velifer" ~ "carvel",
    fish_sp_x == "Hybognathus nuchalis" ~ "hybnuc",
    fish_sp_x == "Notropis atherinoides" ~ "notath",
    fish_sp_x == "Ictalurus punctatus" ~ "ictpun",
    TRUE ~ fish_sp_x
  ))


full_data <- full_data %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(paste(year_collected, month_collected, day_collected, sep = "-"))) 

SPI_data <- SPI_data %>% 
  mutate(date = as.Date(date))

full_data <- full_data %>% 
  mutate(psite_prevalence = as.integer(psite_prevalence))

full_data <- full_data %>% 
  left_join(SPI_data, by = "date")

full_data <- full_data %>% 
  mutate(psite_type = as.factor(psite_type))

## assign control and flood categories to the different SPI value categories 
# category = average = true control
# category = abnormally wet / dry = marginal control 
# category = exceptionally wet / dry = full drought/flood

full_data <- full_data %>%
  mutate(df_event = case_when(
    str_detect(category, "exceptionally wet") ~ "flood",
    str_detect(category, "extremely wet") ~ "flood",
    str_detect(category, "severely wet") ~ "flood",
    str_detect(category, "moderately wet") ~ "flood",
    str_detect(category, "exceptionally dry") ~ "drought",
    str_detect(category, "extremely dry") ~ "drought",
    str_detect(category, "severely dry") ~ "drought",
    str_detect(category, "moderately dry") ~ "drought",
    str_detect(category, "abnormally wet") ~ "control",
    str_detect(category, "abnormally dry") ~ "control",
    str_detect(category, "average") ~ "control", # there are no parasites collected in the "average" grouping
    TRUE ~ "marginal"
  )) %>% 
  mutate(df_event = as.factor(df_event)) %>% 
  mutate(category = as.factor(category)) %>% 
  mutate(psite_type = as.factor(psite_type))


# what are total counts of each parasite type in the main dataset?
summary <- full_data %>%
  group_by(psite_type) %>%
  summarise(
    total_observations = n(),
    total_parasite_count = sum(psite_count, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

```

# Data Prep and Cleaning
### Controls 
Find the average date of a hurricane, so that we can identify when the average hurricane starts and stops and how long it lasts -- this will be used to assign a period of time to our hurricane controls. [This code was used to identify these information, but no longer needs to be run for the analysis to work]. Then, pick out the years in which there was no hurricane, so that we can identify which years to assign as control in our hurricane analysis. 
```{r control assignment to dataframe, eval=FALSE, echo=TRUE}
average_hurr <- hurricane_df6 %>%
  filter(str_detect(ewe_type, "hurricane")) %>%
  mutate(
    month = month(date),
    day = day(date)
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    average_month = mean(month),
    average_day = mean(day)
  )
# average hurricane happens on 9/18 each year
# find average duration of hurricane event
# Define date ranges for hurricane events
hurricane_events <- data.frame(
  start_date = as.Date(c("1969-08-14", "1971-09-05", "1988-09-08", 
                         "1992-08-16", "2004-09-02", "1964-09-28", 
                         "1965-08-27", "1974-08-29", "1995-09-27", 
                         "1998-09-15", "2002-09-21", "1985-08-28", 
                         "2004-09-14", "1979-07-09", "1985-08-12", 
                         "1985-10-26", "1988-09-07", "1997-07-16")),
  end_date = as.Date(c("1969-08-22", "1971-09-15", "1988-09-19", 
                       "1992-08-19", "2004-09-25", "1964-10-05", 
                       "1965-09-13", "1974-09-10", "1995-10-06", 
                       "1998-10-01", "2002-10-04", "1985-09-04", 
                       "2004-09-27", "1979-07-16", "1985-08-20", 
                       "1985-11-03", "1988-09-11", "1997-07-27"))
)

# Calculate durations of each hurricane event
hurricane_events$duration <- as.numeric(hurricane_events$end_date - hurricane_events$start_date)
# Calculate the average duration
average_duration <- mean(hurricane_events$duration)
# Print result
average_duration
# average is 10 days
# years in which there was no hurricane: 1963, 1966, 1967, 1968, 1970, 1972, 1973, 1975, 1976, 1977, 1978, 1980, 1981, 1982, 1983, 1984, 1986, 1987, 1989, 1990, 1991, 1993, 1994, 1999, 2000, 2003

# new method 6/11/25
# Create a table of all labeled date ranges

# Create the storm date ranges
storm_ranges <- tribble(
  ~label,                ~start,              ~end,
  
  # hurricane_5
  "hurricane_5", as.Date("1969-08-14"), as.Date("1969-08-22"),  # Camille
  "hurricane_5", as.Date("1971-09-05"), as.Date("1971-09-15"),  # Edith
  "hurricane_5", as.Date("1992-08-16"), as.Date("1992-08-19"),  # Andrew
  "hurricane_5", as.Date("2004-09-02"), as.Date("2004-09-25"),  # Ivan
  
  # hurricane_4
  "hurricane_4", as.Date("1964-09-28"), as.Date("1964-10-05"),  # Hilda
  "hurricane_4", as.Date("1965-08-27"), as.Date("1965-09-13"),  # Betsy
  "hurricane_4", as.Date("1974-08-29"), as.Date("1974-09-10"),  # Carmen
  "hurricane_4", as.Date("1998-09-15"), as.Date("1998-10-01"),  # Georges
  "hurricane_4", as.Date("2002-09-21"), as.Date("2002-10-04"),  # Lili
  
  # hurricane_3
  "hurricane_3", as.Date("1985-08-28"), as.Date("1985-09-04"),  # Elena
  "hurricane_3", as.Date("2002-09-14"), as.Date("2002-09-27"),  # Isidore
  
  # hurricane_1
  "hurricane_1", as.Date("1979-07-09"), as.Date("1979-07-16"),  # Bob
  "hurricane_1", as.Date("1985-08-12"), as.Date("1985-08-20"),  # Danny
  "hurricane_1", as.Date("1985-10-26"), as.Date("1985-11-03"),  # Juan
  "hurricane_1", as.Date("1988-09-07"), as.Date("1988-09-11"),  # Florence
  "hurricane_1", as.Date("1997-07-16"), as.Date("1997-07-27"),  # Danny
  
  # tropical_storm
  "tropical_storm", as.Date("1988-08-08"), as.Date("1988-08-10"), # Beryl
  "tropical_storm", as.Date("1998-09-27"), as.Date("1998-09-30"), # Hermine
  "tropical_storm", as.Date("2001-06-05"), as.Date("2001-06-20"), # Allison
  "tropical_storm", as.Date("2002-08-04"), as.Date("2002-08-09"), # Bertha
  "tropical_storm", as.Date("2002-09-12"), as.Date("2002-09-15"), # Hanna
  "tropical_storm", as.Date("2003-06-28"), as.Date("2003-07-03"), # Bill
  "tropical_storm", as.Date("1965-09-24"), as.Date("1965-09-30"), # Debbie
  
  # hurricane_double
  "hurricane_double", as.Date("1995-07-31"), as.Date("1995-10-06")  # Opal + Erin
)


hurricane_events <- storm_ranges

# Calculate durations of each hurricane event
hurricane_events$duration <- as.numeric(hurricane_events$end - hurricane_events$start)
# Calculate the average duration
average_duration <- mean(hurricane_events$duration)
# Print result
average_duration
# average is 12 days

all_years <- 1963:2005

event_years <- unique(unlist(lapply(1:nrow(storm_ranges), function(i) {
  seq(year(storm_ranges$start[i]), year(storm_ranges$end[i]))
})))

no_event_years <- setdiff(all_years, event_years)

print(no_event_years)
# years in which there was no hurricane: 1963 1966 1967 1968 1970 1972 1973 1975 1976 1977 1978 1980 1981 1982 1983 1984 1986 1987 1989 1990 1991 1993 1994 1996 1999 2000 2005

# need to omit years 1969 and 2000 as their control periods overlap with hurricane events, so we have 25 control years and 24 hurricane events in total (with one of those hurricanes representing a 'double' storm aka 2 hurricanes close in time to each other)

# assign a random number between 1 and 24 for each of these no event years:
shuffled_years <- sample(no_event_years)

random_values <- c(sample(1:24), rep(NA, length(no_event_years) - 24))

no_event_df <- data.frame(
  control_year = shuffled_years,
  random_value = random_values
)

n_events <- nrow(hurricane_events)

if (n_events > 24) {
  stop("Too many events: can't assign unique numbers from 1 to 24 without repeats.")
}

hurricane_events$random_value <- sample(1:24, n_events, replace = TRUE)

combined_by_random <- full_join(hurricane_events, no_event_df, by = "random_value", suffix = c("_event", "_noevent"))

# there are more control years than there are storms, so 

# this randomization will likely be newly random each time this code is run, so as reference, this chunk was applied to the controls df on 6/19/25 and each storm that was given a random control year assignment was sorted numerically by random number and processed downward. Therefore, hurricane camille will receive the first randomly selected control year and so on

# no 1969 or 2000 control years were randomly selected for our controls on 6/19/25

```
#### Control troubleshooting
Correct controls by identifying overlaps and reducing the period of control to not overlap with a hurricane event anymore
```{r, eval=FALSE, echo=TRUE}
# Hilda (1964)	1964-03-28	1965-04-05	Hurricane -- OK
# Betsy (1965)	1965-02-27	1966-03-13	Hurricane -- OK 
#  Debbie (1965)	1965-03-23	1966-04-01	Hurricane -- overlap with control 
# Control (1966) 1966-03-05 1967-03-15 Control -- overlap with debbie
# Control (1966) 1966-02-16 1967-03-19 Control -- overlap with debbie 
# Juan (1967)	1967-04-26	1968-05-03	Hurricane -- OK
# Camille (1969)	1969-02-14	1970-02-22	Hurricane -- OK
# Hermine (1970)	1970-03-26	1971-04-01	Control -- OK 
# Allison (1970)	1970-06-05	1971-12-20	Control -- overlap with edith (1970-12-05 to 1972-12-20)
# Edith (1971)	1971-03-05	1972-03-15	Hurricane -- overlap with control (edith is 1971-03-05 to 1972-03-15) 
# Camille (1973)	1973-02-14	1974-02-22	Control -- OK
# Carmen (1974)	1974-02-28	1975-03-10	Hurricane -- overlap with control
# Bertha (1975)	1975-02-04	1976-02-09	Control -- overlap with carmen
# Hanna (1975)	1975-03-12	1976-03-15	Control -- OK
# Bill (1975)	1975-06-27	1976-01-04	Control -- OK
# Opal + Erin (1976)	1976-01-30	1977-04-07	Control -- OK 
# Florence (1977)	1977-03-07	1978-03-11	Control -- OK 
# Danny (1978)	1978-01-16	1979-01-27	Control -- OK 
# Beryl (1978)	1978-02-07	1979-02-11	Control -- overlap with bob
# Bob (1979)	1979-01-09	1980-01-16	Hurricane -- overlap with control
# Danny (1980)	1980-02-12	1981-02-20	Control -- OK 
# Betsy (1982)	1982-02-27	1983-03-13	Control -- OK
# Bob (1983)	1983-01-09	1984-01-16	Control -- OK 
# Elena (1985)	1985-02-28	1986-03-04	Hurricane -- OK 
# Danny (1985)	1985-02-12	1986-02-20	Hurricane -- OK 
# Juan (1985)	1985-04-26	1986-05-03	Hurricane -- overlap with control
# Lili (1986)	1986-03-21	1987-04-04	Control -- overlap with juan
# Elena (1986)	1986-02-28	1987-03-04	Control -- overlap with juan
# Carmen (1987)	1987-02-28	1988-03-10	Control -- overlap with florence
# Georges (1987)	1987-03-15	1988-04-01	Control -- overlap with florence
# Florence (1988)	1988-03-07	1989-03-11	Hurricane -- overlap with control
# Beryl (1988)	1988-02-07	1989-02-11	Tropical Storm --  nearly eclipsed by florence
# Debbie (1989)	1989-03-23	1990-04-01	Control -- OK
# Andrew (1992)	1992-02-16	1993-03-19	Hurricane -- overlap with control
# Ivan (1993)	1993-03-02	1994-03-25	Control -- overlap with andrew
# Hilda (1993)	1993-03-28	1994-04-05	Control -- OK 
# Opal + Erin (1995)	1995-01-30	1996-04-07	Hurricane -- overlap with conrol
# Isidore (1996)	1996-03-14	1997-03-27	Control -- overlap with danny and opal + erin
# Danny (1997)	1997-01-16	1998-01-27	Hurricane -- overlap with control
# Georges (1998)	1998-03-15	1999-04-01	Hurricane -- OK
# Hermine (1998)	1998-03-26	1999-04-01	Tropical Storm -- totally eclipsed by georges
# Allison (2001)	2000-12-05	2001-12-20	Tropical Storm -- OK
# Isidore (2002)	2002-03-14	2003-03-27	Hurricane -- OK
# Lili (2002)	2002-03-21	2003-04-04	Hurricane -- OK
# Bertha (2002)	2002-02-04	2003-02-09	Tropical Storm -- nearly eclipsed by lili
# Hanna (2002)	2002-03-12	2003-03-15	Tropical Storm -- nearly eclipsed by lili
# Bill (2003)	2002-12-27	2004-01-04	Tropical Storm -- OK
# Ivan (2004)	2004-03-02	2005-03-25	Hurricane -- OK

# same for storms? will lower coded storms overwrite higher up ones? -- georges and hermine --> no it doesnt

```




## Hurricane events and Controls Mapping
Add actual hurricane timeline parameters for 6 month (6 month meaning a buffer period of 6 months before a hurricane [denoted as pre] and 6 months after a hurricane [denoted post]). These dates for hurricane occurance are taken from the [NOAA hurricane watch website](https://coast.noaa.gov/hurricanes/#map=3.51/28.21/-61.45&) and represent all hurricane events that crossed a 50 mile boundary of the Pearl River from source to sea. 
```{r hurricane event and control assignment to df}
# controls first
# new control assignment, randomly assign a year to each of the actual hurricane periods according to the combined_by_random df, so that they flow sequentially. For example, if the random number 1 corresponds to the year 1966, then assign the first control to be that year on the first sequential hurricane in the list, so hurricane camille becomes 1966
# out of date controls (contain)
#hurricane_df6 <- hurricane_df6 %>%
#  mutate(control = case_when(
#    date >= as.Date("1973-02-14") & date <= as.Date("1973-08-14") ~ "pre_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1973-08-14") & date <= as.Date("1973-08-22") ~ "control", #camille 1973
#    date >= as.Date("1973-08-22") & date <= as.Date("1974-02-22") ~ "post_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1966-03-05") & date <= as.Date("1966-09-05") ~ "pre_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1966-09-05") & date <= as.Date("1966-09-15") ~ "control", #edith 1966
#    date >= as.Date("1966-09-15") & date <= as.Date("1967-03-15") ~ "post_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1966-02-16") & date <= as.Date("1966-08-16") ~ "pre_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1966-08-16") & date <= as.Date("1966-08-19") ~ "control", #andrew 1966
#    date >= as.Date("1966-08-19") & date <= as.Date("1967-03-19") ~ "post_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1993-03-02") & date <= as.Date("1993-09-02") ~ "pre_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1993-09-02") & date <= as.Date("1993-09-25") ~ "control", #ivan -- external 1993
#    date >= as.Date("1993-09-25") & date <= as.Date("1994-03-25") ~ "post_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1993-03-28") & date <= as.Date("1993-09-28") ~ "pre_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1993-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1993-10-05") ~ "control", #hilda 1993
#    date >= as.Date("1993-10-05") & date <= as.Date("1994-04-05") ~ "post_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1982-02-27") & date <= as.Date("1982-08-27") ~ "pre_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1982-08-27") & date <= as.Date("1982-09-13") ~ "control", #betsy 1982
#    date >= as.Date("1982-09-13") & date <= as.Date("1983-03-13") ~ "post_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1987-02-28") & date <= as.Date("1987-08-29") ~ "pre_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1987-08-29") & date <= as.Date("1987-09-10") ~ "control", #carmen -- external 1987
#    date >= as.Date("1987-09-10") & date <= as.Date("1988-03-10") ~ "post_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1987-03-15") & date <= as.Date("1987-09-15") ~ "pre_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1987-09-15") & date <= as.Date("1987-10-01") ~ "control", #georges 1987
#    date >= as.Date("1987-10-01") & date <= as.Date("1988-04-01") ~ "post_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1986-03-21") & date <= as.Date("1986-09-21") ~ "pre_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1986-09-21") & date <= as.Date("1986-10-04") ~ "control", #lili -- external 1986
#    date >= as.Date("1986-10-04") & date <= as.Date("1987-04-04") ~ "post_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1986-02-28") & date <= as.Date("1986-08-28") ~ "pre_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1986-08-28") & date <= as.Date("1986-09-04") ~ "control", #elena 1986
#    date >= as.Date("1986-09-04") & date <= as.Date("1987-03-04") ~ "post_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1996-03-14") & date <= as.Date("1996-09-14") ~ "pre_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1996-09-14") & date <= as.Date("1996-09-27") ~ "control", #isidore 1996
#    date >= as.Date("1996-09-27") & date <= as.Date("1997-03-27") ~ "post_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1983-01-09") & date <= as.Date("1983-07-09") ~ "pre_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1983-07-09") & date <= as.Date("1983-07-16") ~ "control", #bob 1983
#    date >= as.Date("1983-07-16") & date <= as.Date("1984-01-16") ~ "post_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1980-02-12") & date <= as.Date("1980-08-12") ~ "pre_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1980-08-12") & date <= as.Date("1980-08-20") ~ "control", #danny -- external 1980
#    date >= as.Date("1980-08-20") & date <= as.Date("1981-02-20") ~ "post_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1967-04-26") & date <= as.Date("1967-10-26") ~ "pre_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1967-10-26") & date <= as.Date("1967-11-03") ~ "control", #juan 1967
#    date >= as.Date("1967-11-03") & date <= as.Date("1968-05-03") ~ "post_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1977-03-07") & date <= as.Date("1977-09-07") ~ "pre_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1977-09-07") & date <= as.Date("1977-09-11") ~ "control", #florence 1977
#    date >= as.Date("1977-09-11") & date <= as.Date("1978-03-11") ~ "post_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1978-01-16") & date <= as.Date("1978-07-16") ~ "pre_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1978-07-16") & date <= as.Date("1978-07-27") ~ "control", #danny 1978
#    date >= as.Date("1978-07-27") & date <= as.Date("1979-01-27") ~ "post_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1978-02-07") & date <= as.Date("1978-08-07") ~ "pre_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1978-08-08") & date <= as.Date("1978-08-10") ~ "control", #beryl 1978
#    date >= as.Date("1978-08-11") & date <= as.Date("1979-02-11") ~ "post_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1970-03-26") & date <= as.Date("1970-09-26") ~ "pre_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1970-09-27") & date <= as.Date("1970-09-30") ~ "control", #hermine 1970
#    date >= as.Date("1970-10-01") & date <= as.Date("1971-04-01") ~ "post_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1970-12-05") & date <= as.Date("1971-06-05") ~ "pre_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1971-06-05") & date <= as.Date("1971-06-20") ~ "control", #allison 1970
#    date >= as.Date("1971-06-20") & date <= as.Date("1972-12-20") ~ "post_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1975-02-04") & date <= as.Date("1975-08-04") ~ "pre_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1975-08-04") & date <= as.Date("1975-08-09") ~ "control", #bertha 1975
#    date >= as.Date("1975-08-09") & date <= as.Date("1976-02-09") ~ "post_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1975-03-12") & date <= as.Date("1975-09-12") ~ "pre_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1975-09-12") & date <= as.Date("1975-09-15") ~ "control", #hanna 1975
#    date >= as.Date("1975-09-15") & date <= as.Date("1976-03-15") ~ "post_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1975-12-27") & date <= as.Date("1976-06-27") ~ "pre_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1976-06-28") & date <= as.Date("1976-07-03") ~ "control", #bill 1975
#    date >= as.Date("1976-07-04") & date <= as.Date("1977-01-04") ~ "post_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1989-03-23") & date <= as.Date("1989-09-23") ~ "pre_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1989-09-24") & date <= as.Date("1989-09-30") ~ "control", #debbie 1989
#    date >= as.Date("1989-10-01") & date <= as.Date("1990-04-01") ~ "post_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1976-01-30") & date <= as.Date("1976-07-30") ~ "pre_control",
#    date >= as.Date("1976-07-31") & date <= as.Date("1976-10-06") ~ "control", #opal (4) and erin (2) combined 1976
#    date >= as.Date("1976-10-07") & date <= as.Date("1977-04-07") ~ "post_control",
#    TRUE ~ "no event"
#  ))

# updated controls according to protocol below:
hurricane_df6 <- full_data %>%
  mutate(control = case_when(
    date >= as.Date("1973-02-14") & date <= as.Date("1973-08-14") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1973-08-14") & date <= as.Date("1973-08-22") ~ "control", #camille 1973
    date >= as.Date("1973-08-22") & date <= as.Date("1974-02-22") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1966-04-02") & date <= as.Date("1966-09-05") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1966-09-05") & date <= as.Date("1966-09-15") ~ "control", #edith 1966
    date >= as.Date("1966-09-15") & date <= as.Date("1967-03-15") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1966-04-02") & date <= as.Date("1966-08-16") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1966-08-16") & date <= as.Date("1966-08-19") ~ "control", #andrew 1966
    date >= as.Date("1966-08-19") & date <= as.Date("1967-03-19") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1993-03-20") & date <= as.Date("1993-09-02") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1993-09-02") & date <= as.Date("1993-09-25") ~ "control", #ivan -- external 1993
    date >= as.Date("1993-09-25") & date <= as.Date("1994-03-25") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1993-03-28") & date <= as.Date("1993-09-28") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1993-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1993-10-05") ~ "control", #hilda 1993
    date >= as.Date("1993-10-05") & date <= as.Date("1994-04-05") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1982-02-27") & date <= as.Date("1982-08-27") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1982-08-27") & date <= as.Date("1982-09-13") ~ "control", #betsy 1982
    date >= as.Date("1982-09-13") & date <= as.Date("1983-03-13") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1987-02-28") & date <= as.Date("1987-08-29") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1987-08-29") & date <= as.Date("1987-09-10") ~ "control", #carmen -- external 1987
    date >= as.Date("1987-09-10") & date <= as.Date("1988-03-06") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1987-03-15") & date <= as.Date("1987-09-15") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1987-09-15") & date <= as.Date("1987-10-01") ~ "control", #georges 1987
    date >= as.Date("1987-10-01") & date <= as.Date("1988-03-06") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1986-05-04") & date <= as.Date("1986-09-21") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1986-09-21") & date <= as.Date("1986-10-04") ~ "control", #lili -- external 1986
    date >= as.Date("1986-10-04") & date <= as.Date("1987-04-04") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1986-05-04") & date <= as.Date("1986-08-28") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1986-08-28") & date <= as.Date("1986-09-04") ~ "control", #elena 1986
    date >= as.Date("1986-09-04") & date <= as.Date("1987-03-04") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1996-04-08") & date <= as.Date("1996-09-14") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1996-09-14") & date <= as.Date("1996-09-27") ~ "control", #isidore 1996
    date >= as.Date("1996-09-27") & date <= as.Date("1997-01-15") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1983-01-09") & date <= as.Date("1983-07-09") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1983-07-09") & date <= as.Date("1983-07-16") ~ "control", #bob 1983
    date >= as.Date("1983-07-16") & date <= as.Date("1984-01-16") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1980-02-12") & date <= as.Date("1980-08-12") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1980-08-12") & date <= as.Date("1980-08-20") ~ "control", #danny -- external 1980
    date >= as.Date("1980-08-20") & date <= as.Date("1981-02-20") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1967-04-26") & date <= as.Date("1967-10-26") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1967-10-26") & date <= as.Date("1967-11-03") ~ "control", #juan 1967
    date >= as.Date("1967-11-03") & date <= as.Date("1968-05-03") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1977-03-07") & date <= as.Date("1977-09-07") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1977-09-07") & date <= as.Date("1977-09-11") ~ "control", #florence 1977
    date >= as.Date("1977-09-11") & date <= as.Date("1978-03-11") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1978-01-16") & date <= as.Date("1978-07-16") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1978-07-16") & date <= as.Date("1978-07-27") ~ "control", #danny 1978
    date >= as.Date("1978-07-27") & date <= as.Date("1979-01-27") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1978-02-07") & date <= as.Date("1978-08-07") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1978-08-08") & date <= as.Date("1978-08-10") ~ "control", #beryl 1978
    date >= as.Date("1978-08-11") & date <= as.Date("1979-01-08") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1970-03-26") & date <= as.Date("1970-09-26") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1970-09-27") & date <= as.Date("1970-09-30") ~ "control", #hermine 1970
    date >= as.Date("1970-10-01") & date <= as.Date("1971-04-01") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1970-12-05") & date <= as.Date("1971-03-04") ~ "pre_control", #allison 1970 (actual control period eclipsed)
    date >= as.Date("1971-03-16") & date <= as.Date("1972-12-20") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1975-03-11") & date <= as.Date("1975-08-04") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1975-08-04") & date <= as.Date("1975-08-09") ~ "control", #bertha 1975
    date >= as.Date("1975-08-09") & date <= as.Date("1976-02-09") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1975-03-12") & date <= as.Date("1975-09-12") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1975-09-12") & date <= as.Date("1975-09-15") ~ "control", #hanna 1975
    date >= as.Date("1975-09-15") & date <= as.Date("1976-03-15") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1975-12-27") & date <= as.Date("1976-06-27") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1976-06-28") & date <= as.Date("1976-07-03") ~ "control", #bill 1975
    date >= as.Date("1976-07-04") & date <= as.Date("1977-01-04") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1989-03-23") & date <= as.Date("1989-09-23") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1989-09-24") & date <= as.Date("1989-09-30") ~ "control", #debbie 1989
    date >= as.Date("1989-10-01") & date <= as.Date("1990-04-01") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1976-01-30") & date <= as.Date("1976-07-30") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1976-07-31") & date <= as.Date("1976-10-06") ~ "control", #opal (4) and erin (2) combined 1976
    date >= as.Date("1976-10-07") & date <= as.Date("1977-04-07") ~ "post_control",
    TRUE ~ "no event"
  ))

# now hurricane events
hurricane_df6 <- hurricane_df6 %>%
  mutate(ewe_type = case_when(
    date >= as.Date("1969-02-14") & date <= as.Date("1969-08-14") ~ "pre_5",
    date >= as.Date("1969-08-14") & date <= as.Date("1969-08-22") ~ "hurricane_5", #camille
    date >= as.Date("1969-08-22") & date <= as.Date("1970-02-22") ~ "post_5",
    date >= as.Date("1971-03-05") & date <= as.Date("1971-09-05") ~ "pre_5",
    date >= as.Date("1971-09-05") & date <= as.Date("1971-09-15") ~ "hurricane_5", #edith
    date >= as.Date("1971-09-15") & date <= as.Date("1972-03-15") ~ "post_5",
    date >= as.Date("1992-02-16") & date <= as.Date("1992-08-16") ~ "pre_5",
    date >= as.Date("1992-08-16") & date <= as.Date("1992-08-19") ~ "hurricane_5", #andrew
    date >= as.Date("1992-08-19") & date <= as.Date("1993-03-19") ~ "post_5",
    date >= as.Date("2004-03-02") & date <= as.Date("2004-09-02") ~ "pre_5",
    date >= as.Date("2004-09-02") & date <= as.Date("2004-09-25") ~ "hurricane_5", #ivan -- external
    date >= as.Date("2004-09-25") & date <= as.Date("2005-03-25") ~ "post_5",
    date >= as.Date("1964-03-28") & date <= as.Date("1964-09-28") ~ "pre_4",
    date >= as.Date("1964-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1964-10-05") ~ "hurricane_4", #hilda
    date >= as.Date("1964-10-05") & date <= as.Date("1965-04-05") ~ "post_4",
    date >= as.Date("1965-02-27") & date <= as.Date("1965-08-27") ~ "pre_4",
    date >= as.Date("1965-08-27") & date <= as.Date("1965-09-13") ~ "hurricane_4", #betsy
    date >= as.Date("1965-09-13") & date <= as.Date("1966-03-13") ~ "post_4",
    date >= as.Date("1974-02-28") & date <= as.Date("1974-08-29") ~ "pre_4",
    date >= as.Date("1974-08-29") & date <= as.Date("1974-09-10") ~ "hurricane_4", #carmen -- external
    date >= as.Date("1974-09-10") & date <= as.Date("1975-03-10") ~ "post_4",
    date >= as.Date("1998-03-15") & date <= as.Date("1998-09-15") ~ "pre_4",
    date >= as.Date("1998-09-15") & date <= as.Date("1998-10-01") ~ "hurricane_4", #georges
    date >= as.Date("1998-10-01") & date <= as.Date("1999-04-01") ~ "post_4",
    date >= as.Date("2002-03-21") & date <= as.Date("2002-09-21") ~ "pre_4",
    date >= as.Date("2002-09-21") & date <= as.Date("2002-10-04") ~ "hurricane_4", #lili -- external 
    date >= as.Date("2002-10-04") & date <= as.Date("2003-04-04") ~ "post_4",
    date >= as.Date("1985-02-28") & date <= as.Date("1985-08-28") ~ "pre_3",
    date >= as.Date("1985-08-28") & date <= as.Date("1985-09-04") ~ "hurricane_3", #elena
    date >= as.Date("1985-09-04") & date <= as.Date("1986-03-04") ~ "post_3",
    date >= as.Date("2002-03-14") & date <= as.Date("2002-09-14") ~ "pre_3",
    date >= as.Date("2002-09-14") & date <= as.Date("2002-09-27") ~ "hurricane_3", #isidore 
    date >= as.Date("2002-09-27") & date <= as.Date("2003-03-27") ~ "post_3",
    date >= as.Date("1979-01-09") & date <= as.Date("1979-07-09") ~ "pre_1",
    date >= as.Date("1979-07-09") & date <= as.Date("1979-07-16") ~ "hurricane_1", #bob
    date >= as.Date("1979-07-16") & date <= as.Date("1980-01-16") ~ "post_1",
    date >= as.Date("1985-02-12") & date <= as.Date("1985-08-12") ~ "pre_1",
    date >= as.Date("1985-08-12") & date <= as.Date("1985-08-20") ~ "hurricane_1", #danny -- external
    date >= as.Date("1985-08-20") & date <= as.Date("1986-02-20") ~ "post_1",
    date >= as.Date("1985-04-26") & date <= as.Date("1985-10-26") ~ "pre_1",
    date >= as.Date("1985-10-26") & date <= as.Date("1985-11-03") ~ "hurricane_1", #juan
    date >= as.Date("1985-11-03") & date <= as.Date("1986-05-03") ~ "post_1",
    date >= as.Date("1988-03-07") & date <= as.Date("1988-09-07") ~ "pre_1",
    date >= as.Date("1988-09-07") & date <= as.Date("1988-09-11") ~ "hurricane_1", #florence
    date >= as.Date("1988-09-11") & date <= as.Date("1989-03-11") ~ "post_1",
    date >= as.Date("1997-01-16") & date <= as.Date("1997-07-16") ~ "pre_1",
    date >= as.Date("1997-07-16") & date <= as.Date("1997-07-27") ~ "hurricane_1", #danny
    date >= as.Date("1997-07-27") & date <= as.Date("1998-01-27") ~ "post_1",
    date >= as.Date("1988-02-07") & date <= as.Date("1988-08-07") ~ "pre_ts",
    date >= as.Date("1988-08-08") & date <= as.Date("1988-08-10") ~ "tropical_storm", #beryl
    date >= as.Date("1988-08-11") & date <= as.Date("1989-02-11") ~ "post_ts",
    date >= as.Date("1998-03-26") & date <= as.Date("1998-09-26") ~ "pre_ts",
    date >= as.Date("1998-09-27") & date <= as.Date("1998-09-30") ~ "tropical_storm", #hermine
    date >= as.Date("1998-10-01") & date <= as.Date("1999-04-01") ~ "post_ts",
    date >= as.Date("2000-12-05") & date <= as.Date("2001-06-05") ~ "pre_ts",
    date >= as.Date("2001-06-05") & date <= as.Date("2001-06-20") ~ "tropical_storm", #allison
    date >= as.Date("2001-06-20") & date <= as.Date("2001-12-20") ~ "post_ts",
    date >= as.Date("2002-02-04") & date <= as.Date("2002-08-04") ~ "pre_ts",
    date >= as.Date("2002-08-04") & date <= as.Date("2002-08-09") ~ "tropical_storm", #bertha
    date >= as.Date("2002-08-09") & date <= as.Date("2003-02-09") ~ "post_ts",
    date >= as.Date("2002-03-12") & date <= as.Date("2002-09-12") ~ "pre_ts",
    date >= as.Date("2002-09-12") & date <= as.Date("2002-09-15") ~ "tropical_storm", #hanna
    date >= as.Date("2002-09-15") & date <= as.Date("2003-03-15") ~ "post_ts",
    date >= as.Date("2002-12-27") & date <= as.Date("2003-06-27") ~ "pre_ts",
    date >= as.Date("2003-06-28") & date <= as.Date("2003-07-03") ~ "tropical_storm", #bill
    date >= as.Date("2003-07-04") & date <= as.Date("2004-01-04") ~ "post_ts",
    date >= as.Date("1965-03-23") & date <= as.Date("1965-09-23") ~ "pre_ts",
    date >= as.Date("1965-09-24") & date <= as.Date("1965-09-30") ~ "tropical_storm", #debbie
    date >= as.Date("1965-10-01") & date <= as.Date("1966-04-01") ~ "post_ts",
    date >= as.Date("1995-01-30") & date <= as.Date("1995-07-30") ~ "pre_double",
    date >= as.Date("1995-07-31") & date <= as.Date("1995-10-06") ~ "hurricane_double", #opal (4) and erin (2) combined
    date >= as.Date("1995-10-07") & date <= as.Date("1996-04-07") ~ "post_double",
    TRUE ~ "no event"
  ))

# make a new column for storm intensity

hurricane_df6 <- hurricane_df6 %>%
  mutate(storm_intensity = case_when(
    str_detect(ewe_type, "1") ~ "one",
    str_detect(ewe_type, "2") ~ "two",
    str_detect(ewe_type, "3") ~ "three",
    str_detect(ewe_type, "4") ~ "four",
    str_detect(ewe_type, "5") ~ "five",
    str_detect(ewe_type, "ts") ~ "ts",
    str_detect(ewe_type, "double") ~ "double",
    TRUE ~ "no event"
  ))

hurricane_df6 <- hurricane_df6 %>%
  mutate(event = case_when(
    ewe_type == "pre_5" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "post_5" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "pre_4" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "post_4" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "pre_3" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "post_3" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "pre_2" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "post_2" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "pre_1" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "post_1" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "pre_ts" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "post_ts" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "pre_double" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "post_double" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "no event" & control == "pre_control" ~ "control",
    ewe_type == "no event" & control == "post_control" ~ "control",
    TRUE ~ "NA"
  )) %>%
  filter(event != "NA")

hurricane_df6 <- hurricane_df6 %>%
  mutate(timing = case_when(
    ewe_type == "pre_5" ~ "pre",
    ewe_type == "post_5" ~ "post",
    ewe_type == "pre_4" ~ "pre",
    ewe_type == "post_4" ~ "post",
    ewe_type == "pre_3" ~ "pre",
    ewe_type == "post_3" ~ "post",
    ewe_type == "pre_2" ~ "pre",
    ewe_type == "post_2" ~ "post",
    ewe_type == "pre_1" ~ "pre",
    ewe_type == "post_1" ~ "post",
    ewe_type == "pre_ts" ~ "pre",
    ewe_type == "post_ts" ~ "post",
    ewe_type == "pre_double" ~ "pre",
    ewe_type == "post_double" ~ "post",
    control == "pre_control" ~ "pre",
    control == "post_control" ~ "post",
    ewe_type == "hurricane_4" ~ "during",
    TRUE ~ "NA"
  )) %>% 
  filter(timing != "NA")


hurricane_df6 <- hurricane_df6 %>%
  mutate(timing = factor(timing, levels = c("pre", "post"))) %>%
  mutate(timing = relevel(timing, ref = "pre")) %>% 
  mutate(event = factor(event, levels = c("hurricane", "control"))) %>%
  mutate(event = relevel(event, ref = "control")) 

# ===== filtering for abundance analysis ===== #
# drop low replicate categories
hurricane_df_abundance <- hurricane_df6 %>%
  filter(psite_type %in% c("trematode", "trematode_metacercaria", "monogenean")) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(psite_type = droplevels(psite_type))

# filter out all remaining NAs from the psite_abundance column --> there are some but shouldn't be 
hurricane_df_abundance <- hurricane_df_abundance %>%
  filter(!is.na(psite_abundance))

# ===== filtering for prevalence analysis ===== #
# drop low replicate categories
hurricane_df_prevalence <- hurricane_df6 %>%
  filter(psite_type %in% c("myxozoan"))

# filter out all remaining NAs from the psite_prevalence column --> there are none
hurricane_df_prevalence <- hurricane_df_prevalence %>%
  filter(!is.na(psite_prevalence))


# what are total counts of each parasite type in each category?
summary <- hurricane_df_abundance %>%
  group_by(event, timing, psite_type) %>%
  summarise(
    total_observations = n(),
    total_parasite_count = sum(psite_count, na.rm = TRUE),  # sum of parasite counts
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(summary,
       aes(x = event, y = total_observations, fill = psite_type)) +
  facet_wrap(~ timing) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
  labs(x = "Event", y = "Total Observations", fill = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

summary <- hurricane_df_prevalence %>%
  group_by(event, timing, psite_type) %>%
  summarise(
    total_observations = n(),
    total_parasite_count = sum(psite_count, na.rm = TRUE),  # sum of parasite counts
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(summary,
       aes(x = event, y = total_observations, fill = psite_type)) +
  facet_wrap(~ timing) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
  labs(x = "Event", y = "Total Observations", fill = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

```

# Abundance
## Plot raw data (as averages not sums) to identify any trends in the data or inconsistencies.
```{r}
# how many replicates are in each category --> this is just the number of occurrences, not abundance of parasites
ha.reps <- hurricane_df_abundance %>% 
  group_by(event, timing, psite_type, fish_sp_x) %>% 
  summarize(observations = n(), .groups = "drop")

# plot how many of each category we have
raw1 <- ggplot(ha.reps,
       aes(x = fish_sp_x, y = observations, fill = psite_type)) +
  facet_wrap(timing ~ event) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
  labs(x = "Fish Species", y = "Number of Observations", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

# hurricane abundance with parasite type
ha.bins1 <- hurricane_df_abundance %>% 
  group_by(event, timing, psite_type) %>% 
  summarize(avg.bin = mean(psite_abundance))

# use this as the raw plot of data
raw2 <- ggplot(ha.bins1,
       aes(x = timing, y = avg.bin, fill = psite_type)) +
  facet_wrap( ~ event) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
  labs(x = "Timing", y = "Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

# hurricane abundance with fish species and parasite type
ha.bins2 <- hurricane_df_abundance %>% 
  group_by(event, timing, psite_type, fish_sp_x) %>% 
  summarize(avg.bin = mean(psite_abundance))

# use this as the raw plot of data
raw3 <- ggplot(ha.bins2,
       aes(x = fish_sp_x, y = avg.bin, fill = psite_type)) +
  facet_wrap(timing ~ event) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
  labs(x = "Fish Species", y = "Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

hurricane_abundance_raw <- ggarrange(raw1, raw2, raw3, common.legend = FALSE, legend = "bottom", labels = c("A", "B", "C"))
plot(hurricane_abundance_raw)
```

## Drop carvel and pervig from analysis since they do not have monos and metas consistently
```{r}
hurricane_df_abundance_only_full <- hurricane_df_abundance %>% 
  filter(!fish_sp_x %in% c("pervig", "carvel"))

# plot new raw data
# how many replicates are in each category--> this is just the number of occurrences, not abundance of parasites
ha.reps <- hurricane_df_abundance_only_full %>% 
  group_by(event, timing, psite_type, fish_sp_x) %>% 
  summarize(observations = n(), .groups = "drop")

# plot how many of each category we have
raw1_f <- ggplot(ha.reps,
       aes(x = fish_sp_x, y = observations, fill = psite_type)) +
  facet_wrap(timing ~ event) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
  labs(x = "Fish Species", y = "Number of Observations", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

# hurricane abundance with parasite type --> average abundances 
ha.bins1 <- hurricane_df_abundance_only_full %>% 
  group_by(event, timing, psite_type) %>% 
  summarize(avg.bin = mean(psite_abundance))

# use this as the raw plot of data
raw2_f <- ggplot(ha.bins1,
       aes(x = timing, y = avg.bin, fill = psite_type)) +
  facet_wrap( ~ event) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
  labs(x = "Timing", y = "Average Parasite Abundance", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

# hurricane abundance with fish species and parasite type
ha.bins2 <- hurricane_df_abundance_only_full %>% 
  group_by(event, timing, psite_type, fish_sp_x) %>% 
  summarize(avg.bin = mean(psite_abundance))

# use this as the raw plot of data
raw3_f <- ggplot(ha.bins2,
       aes(x = fish_sp_x, y = avg.bin, fill = psite_type)) +
  facet_wrap(timing ~ event) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
  labs(x = "Fish Species", y = "Average Parasite Abundance", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

hurricane_abundance_raw_only_full <- ggarrange(raw1_f, raw2_f, raw3_f, common.legend = FALSE, legend = "bottom", labels = c("A", "B", "C"))
plot(hurricane_abundance_raw_only_full)
```
## Seasonality influencing distribution of abundance
```{r}
# month against number of replicates
ha.season <- hurricane_df_abundance_only_full %>% 
  group_by(event, timing, psite_type, fish_sp_x, season, year_collected) %>% 
  summarize(observations = n(), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(ha.season,
       aes(x = year_collected, y = event, fill = psite_type)) +
  facet_wrap(~ timing) +
  geom_violin() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
  labs(x = "Season", y = "Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

# run a model to see if season has an effect on occurrences
season_model <- glmmTMB(observations ~ season*event, family = nbinom2, data = ha.season)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = season_model, plot = TRUE)
summary(season_model)
plot(parameters(season_model))

# more hurricanes in summer, as expected 
```

## Abundance Models
### Negative binomial glmmTMB model validation
```{r model validation abundance, echo=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
# no offset
# nbinom1 log

nbinom1log <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom1, data = hurricane_df_abundance_only_full)

# nbinom1 sqrt

nbinom1sqrt <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom1(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_abundance_only_full)

# nbinom2 log

nbinom2log <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom2, data = hurricane_df_abundance_only_full)

# nbinom2 sqrt

nbinom2sqrt <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom2(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_abundance_only_full)

# nbinom12 log

nbinom12log <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom12, data = hurricane_df_abundance_only_full)

#nbinom12 sqrt

nbinom12sqrt <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom12(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_abundance_only_full)
## offset

# nbinom1 log

nbinom1logoff <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(log(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom1, data = hurricane_df_abundance_only_full)

# nbinom1 sqrt

nbinom1sqrtoff <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom1(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_abundance_only_full)

# nbinom2 log

nbinom2logoff <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(log(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom2, data = hurricane_df_abundance_only_full)

# nbinom2 sqrt

nbinom2sqrtoff <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom2(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_abundance_only_full)

# nbinom12 log

nbinom12logoff <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(log(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom12, data = hurricane_df_abundance_only_full)

#nbinom12 sqrt

nbinom12sqrtoff <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom12(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_abundance_only_full)


# List of all model objects
models <- list(
  nbinom1log, nbinom1sqrt, nbinom2log, nbinom2sqrt, nbinom12log, nbinom12sqrt,
  nbinom1logoff, nbinom1sqrtoff, nbinom2logoff, nbinom2sqrtoff,
  nbinom12logoff, nbinom12sqrtoff
)

# Model names
model_names <- c(
  "nbinom1log", "nbinom1sqrt", "nbinom2log", "nbinom2sqrt", "nbinom12log", "nbinom12sqrt",
  "nbinom1logoff", "nbinom1sqrtoff", "nbinom2logoff", "nbinom2sqrtoff",
  "nbinom12logoff", "nbinom12sqrtoff"
)

# Simulate residuals and extract diagnostics
residual_summaries <- map2_df(models, model_names, function(model, name) {
  sim <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = model, plot = FALSE)
  data.frame(
    model = name,
    dispersion = testDispersion(sim)$p.value,
    uniformity = testUniformity(sim)$p.value,
    outliers = testOutliers(sim)$p.value,
    AIC = AIC(model)
  )
})

# View and sort by AIC (lower is better) and test stats (higher p-values indicate better fit)
residual_summaries %>%
  arrange(AIC) %>%
  print()
```

## Final Hurricane Abundance Model
```{r}
# run model 
final_h_abundance <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom2, data = hurricane_df_abundance_only_full)

simulateResiduals(fittedModel = final_h_abundance, plot = TRUE)
summary(final_h_abundance)
plot(parameters(final_h_abundance))
```

## Plots -- Abundance
```{r}
#### A 
a1a <- ggpredict(final_h_abundance, terms = c("psite_type", "event"))
a1a <- a1a %>%
  rename(
    psite_type = x,
    estimate = predicted,
    se = std.error,
    lower = conf.low,
    upper = conf.high,
    event = group)


a1ap <- ggplot(a1a,
       aes(x = event, y = estimate)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = psite_type),
                width = 0.05,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = psite_type, linetype = psite_type),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = psite_type, group = psite_type),
             pch = 21, size = 5,
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 8), breaks = seq(0, 8, by = 2)) + 
  labs(x = "Event", y = "Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

#### B
a1b <- ggpredict(final_h_abundance, terms = c("psite_type", "event"))
a1b <- a1b %>%
  rename(
    psite_type = x,
    estimate = predicted,
    se = std.error,
    lower = conf.low,
    upper = conf.high,
    event = group)

a1b <- a1b %>% 
  filter(psite_type %in% c("trematode"))

a1bp <- ggplot(a1b,
       aes(x = event, y = estimate)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = psite_type),
                width = 0.05,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = psite_type, linetype = psite_type),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = psite_type, group = psite_type),
             pch = 21, size = 5,
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 4), breaks = seq(0, 4, by = 2)) + 
  labs(x = "Timing", y = "Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

#### C
a1c <- ggpredict(final_h_abundance, terms = c("psite_type", "event", "timing"))
a1c <- a1c %>%
  rename(
    psite_type = x,
    estimate = predicted,
    se = std.error,
    lower = conf.low,
    upper = conf.high,
    event = group, 
    timing = facet)

a1c <- a1c %>% 
  filter(psite_type %in% c("trematode"))

a1cp <- ggplot(a1c,
       aes(x = timing, y = estimate)) +
  facet_wrap(~ event) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = timing),
                width = 0.05,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = psite_type, linetype = psite_type),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = psite_type, group = psite_type),
             pch = 21, size = 5,
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 4), breaks = seq(0, 4, by = 2)) + 
  labs(x = "Timing", y = "Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

#### D
a1d <- ggpredict(final_h_abundance, terms = c("psite_type", "event", "timing"))
a1d <- a1d %>%
  rename(
    psite_type = x,
    estimate = predicted,
    se = std.error,
    lower = conf.low,
    upper = conf.high,
    event = group, 
    timing = facet)

a1d <- a1d %>% 
  filter(psite_type %in% c("trematode_metacercaria"))

a1dp <- ggplot(a1d,
       aes(x = timing, y = estimate)) +
  facet_wrap(~ event, scales = "free_y") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = timing),
                width = 0.05,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = psite_type, linetype = psite_type),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = psite_type, group = psite_type),
             pch = 21, size = 5,
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 7), breaks = seq(0, 7, by = 2)) + 
  labs(x = "Timing", y = "Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

#### E
a1e <- ggpredict(final_h_abundance, terms = c("psite_type", "event"))
a1e <- a1e %>%
  rename(
    psite_type = x,
    estimate = predicted,
    se = std.error,
    lower = conf.low,
    upper = conf.high,
    event = group)

a1e <- a1e %>% 
  filter(psite_type %in% c("trematode_metacercaria"))

a1ep <- ggplot(a1e,
       aes(x = event, y = estimate)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = event),
                width = 0.05,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = psite_type, linetype = psite_type),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = psite_type, group = psite_type),
             pch = 21, size = 5,
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 7), breaks = seq(0, 7, by = 2)) + 
  labs(x = "Event", y = "Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

# try to plot only monos
a1m <- ggpredict(final_h_abundance, terms = c("psite_type", "event", "timing"))
a1m <- a1m %>%
  rename(
    psite_type = x,
    estimate = predicted,
    se = std.error,
    lower = conf.low,
    upper = conf.high,
    event = group,
    timing = facet)

a1m <- a1m %>% 
  filter(psite_type %in% c("monogenean"))

a1mp <- ggplot(a1m,
       aes(x = timing, y = estimate)) +
  facet_wrap(~ event, scales = "free_y") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = event),
                width = 0.05,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = psite_type, linetype = psite_type),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = psite_type, group = psite_type),
             pch = 21, size = 5,
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 10), breaks = seq(0, 10, by = 2)) + 
  labs(x = "Timing", y = "Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

hurricane_abundance_plot <- ggarrange(a1ap, a1cp, a1dp, a1mp, common.legend = FALSE, legend = "bottom", labels = c("A", "B", "C", "D"))
plot(hurricane_abundance_plot)
```
## Zero inflated results plotted - abundance
```{r}
#### A 
azi1 <- ggemmeans(final_h_abundance, terms = c("psite_type", "event"), component = "zi")

azi1 <- azi1 %>%
  rename(
    psite_type = x,
    estimate = predicted,
    se = std.error,
    lower = conf.low,
    upper = conf.high,
    event = group
  )

azi1p <- ggplot(azi1, aes(x = event, y = estimate)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = psite_type),
                width = 0.05,
                position = position_dodge(0.5)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = psite_type, linetype = psite_type),
            position = position_dodge(0.5)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = psite_type, group = psite_type),
             pch = 21, size = 5,
             position = position_dodge(0.5)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF",
                               "monogenean" = "#A6E000",
                               "trematode" = "#c9ad79",
                               "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 60), breaks = seq(0, 60, 10)) +
  labs(x = "Event",
       y = "Zero-Inflation Estimate",
       fill = "Parasite Type",
       linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme


#### B
azi2 <- ggemmeans(final_h_abundance, terms = c("psite_type", "event"), component = "zi")

azi2 <- azi2 %>%
  rename(
    psite_type = x,
    estimate = predicted,
    se = std.error,
    lower = conf.low,
    upper = conf.high,
    event = group
  )

azi2 <- azi2 %>% 
  filter(psite_type %in% c("trematode"))

azi2p <- ggplot(azi2,
       aes(x = event, y = estimate)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = psite_type),
                width = 0.05,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = psite_type, linetype = psite_type),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = psite_type, group = psite_type),
             pch = 21, size = 5,
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 60), breaks = seq(0, 60, 10)) + 
  labs(x = "Timing", y = "Zero-Inflation Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

#### C
azi3 <- ggemmeans(final_h_abundance, terms = c("psite_type", "event", "timing"), component = "zi")

azi3 <- azi3 %>%
  rename(
    psite_type = x,
    estimate = predicted,
    se = std.error,
    lower = conf.low,
    upper = conf.high,
    event = group, 
    timing = facet
  )

azi3 <- azi3 %>% 
  filter(psite_type %in% c("trematode"))

azi3p <- ggplot(azi3,
       aes(x = timing, y = estimate)) +
  facet_wrap(~ event) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = timing),
                width = 0.05,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = psite_type, linetype = psite_type),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = psite_type, group = psite_type),
             pch = 21, size = 5,
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 60), breaks = seq(0, 60, 10)) + 
  labs(x = "Timing", y = "Zero-Inflation Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

#### D
azi4 <- ggemmeans(final_h_abundance, terms = c("psite_type", "event", "timing"), component = "zi")

azi4 <- azi4 %>%
  rename(
    psite_type = x,
    estimate = predicted,
    se = std.error,
    lower = conf.low,
    upper = conf.high,
    event = group, 
    timing = facet
  )

azi4 <- azi4 %>% 
  filter(psite_type %in% c("trematode_metacercaria"))

azi4p <- ggplot(azi4,
       aes(x = timing, y = estimate)) +
  facet_wrap(~ event) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = timing),
                width = 0.05,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = psite_type, linetype = psite_type),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = psite_type, group = psite_type),
             pch = 21, size = 5,
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 80), breaks = seq(0, 80, 10)) + 
  labs(x = "Timing", y = "Zero-Inflation Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

#### E
azi5 <- ggemmeans(final_h_abundance, terms = c("psite_type", "event"), component = "zi")

azi5 <- azi5 %>%
  rename(
    psite_type = x,
    estimate = predicted,
    se = std.error,
    lower = conf.low,
    upper = conf.high,
    event = group
  )

azi5 <- azi5 %>% 
  filter(psite_type %in% c("trematode_metacercaria"))

azi5p <- ggplot(azi5,
       aes(x = event, y = estimate)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = event),
                width = 0.05,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = psite_type, linetype = psite_type),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = psite_type, group = psite_type),
             pch = 21, size = 5,
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 60), breaks = seq(0, 60, 10)) + 
  labs(x = "Event", y = "Zero-Inflation Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

# try to plot only monos
azi6 <- ggemmeans(final_h_abundance, terms = c("psite_type", "event", "timing"), component = "zi")

azi6 <- azi6 %>%
  rename(
    psite_type = x,
    estimate = predicted,
    se = std.error,
    lower = conf.low,
    upper = conf.high,
    event = group,
    timing = facet
  )

azi6 <- azi6 %>% 
  filter(psite_type %in% c("monogenean"))

azi6p <- ggplot(azi6,
       aes(x = timing, y = estimate)) +
  facet_wrap(~ event, scales = "free_y") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = event),
                width = 0.05,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = psite_type, linetype = psite_type),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = psite_type, group = psite_type),
             pch = 21, size = 5,
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 40), breaks = seq(0, 40, 10)) + 
  labs(x = "Timing", y = "Zero-Inflation Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

hurricane_abundance_plot_zi <- ggarrange(azi1p, azi3p, azi4p, azi6p, common.legend = FALSE, legend = "bottom", labels = c("A", "B", "C", "D"))
plot(hurricane_abundance_plot_zi)
```
## Abundance zi and normal abundance but only estimates of parasites in total (no timing or event)
```{r}
# normal abundance
a_tot <- ggpredict(final_h_abundance, terms = c("psite_type"))
a_tot <- a_tot %>%
  rename(
    psite_type = x,
    estimate = predicted,
    se = std.error,
    lower = conf.low,
    upper = conf.high)


ap_tot <- ggplot(a_tot,
       aes(x = psite_type, y = estimate)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = psite_type),
                width = 0.05,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = psite_type, linetype = psite_type),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = psite_type, group = psite_type),
             pch = 21, size = 5,
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 10), breaks = seq(0, 10, 2)) + 
  labs(x = "Parasite Type", y = "Abundance Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

# zi
azi_tot <- ggemmeans(final_h_abundance, terms = c("psite_type"), component = "zi")

azi_tot <- azi_tot %>%
  rename(
    psite_type = x,
    estimate = predicted,
    se = std.error,
    lower = conf.low,
    upper = conf.high
  )

azip_tot <- ggplot(azi_tot, aes(x = psite_type, y = estimate)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = psite_type),
                width = 0.05,
                position = position_dodge(0.5)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = psite_type, linetype = psite_type),
            position = position_dodge(0.5)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = psite_type, group = psite_type),
             pch = 21, size = 5,
             position = position_dodge(0.5)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF",
                               "monogenean" = "#A6E000",
                               "trematode" = "#c9ad79",
                               "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 60), breaks = seq(0, 60, 10)) +
  labs(x = "Parasite Type",
         y = "Zero-Inflation Estimate",
       fill = "Parasite Type",
       linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

# combine both plots
hurricane_abundance_zi_normal_tot <- ggarrange(ap_tot, azip_tot, common.legend = FALSE, legend = "bottom", labels = c("A", "B"))
plot(hurricane_abundance_zi_normal_tot)

```

# Prevalence 
Plot raw data (as averages not sums) to identify any trends in the data or inconsistencies.
```{r}
# how many replicates are in each category --> this is just the number of occurrences, not abundance of parasites
hp.reps <- hurricane_df_prevalence %>% 
  group_by(event, timing, psite_type, fish_sp_x) %>% 
  summarize(observations = n(), .groups = "drop")

# plot how many of each category we have
raw1p <- ggplot(hp.reps,
       aes(x = fish_sp_x, y = observations, fill = psite_type)) +
  facet_wrap(timing ~ event) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
  labs(x = "Fish Species", y = "Number of Observations", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

# hurricane abundance with parasite type
hp.bins1 <- hurricane_df_prevalence %>% 
  group_by(event, timing, psite_type) %>% 
  summarize(avg.bin = mean(psite_prevalence))

# use this as the raw plot of data
raw2p <- ggplot(hp.bins1,
       aes(x = timing, y = avg.bin, fill = psite_type)) +
  facet_wrap( ~ event) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
  labs(x = "Timing", y = "Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

# hurricane abundance with fish species and parasite type
hp.bins2 <- hurricane_df_prevalence %>% 
  group_by(event, timing, psite_type, fish_sp_x) %>% 
  summarize(avg.bin = mean(psite_prevalence))

# use this as the raw plot of data
raw3p <- ggplot(hp.bins2,
       aes(x = fish_sp_x, y = avg.bin, fill = psite_type)) +
  facet_wrap(timing ~ event) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
  labs(x = "Fish Species", y = "Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

hurricane_prevalence_raw <- ggarrange(raw1p, raw2p, raw3p, common.legend = FALSE, legend = "bottom", labels = c("A", "B", "C"))
plot(hurricane_prevalence_raw)

# no myxos in percina -- is already not in the database
```

## Seasonality influencing distribution - prevalence
```{r}
# month against number of replicates
hp.season <- hurricane_df_prevalence %>% 
  group_by(event, timing, psite_type, fish_sp_x, season) %>% 
  summarize(avg.bin = mean(psite_prevalence))

ggplot(hp.season,
       aes(x = season, y = avg.bin, fill = psite_type)) +
  facet_wrap(timing ~ event) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
  labs(x = "Season", y = "Average Parasite Prevalence", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

# run a model to see if season has an effect on occurrences
season_model <- glmmTMB(avg.bin ~ season*event, family = nbinom2, data = hp.season)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = season_model, plot = TRUE)
summary(season_model)
plot(parameters(season_model))

# summer and intercept(fall) have some sort of significant influence on myxo prevalence --> how to correct for seasonality? 
```


## Prevalence Models
```{r model validation prevalence, eval=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
# no offset
# nbinom1 log

nbinom1log <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + 
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_sp_x),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (total_length_mm|fish_sp_x), 
                                family = nbinom1, data = hurricane_df_prevalence)
# nbinom1 sqrt

nbinom1sqrt <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (total_length_mm|fish_sp_x),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (total_length_mm|fish_sp_x),
                                family = nbinom1(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_prevalence)

# nbinom2 log

nbinom2log <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (total_length_mm|fish_sp_x),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (total_length_mm|fish_sp_x),
                                family = nbinom2, data = hurricane_df_prevalence)

# nbinom2 sqrt

nbinom2sqrt <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (total_length_mm|fish_sp_x),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (total_length_mm|fish_sp_x),
                                family = nbinom2(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_prevalence)

# nbinom12 log

nbinom12log <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (total_length_mm|fish_sp_x),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (total_length_mm|fish_sp_x),
                                family = nbinom12, data = hurricane_df_prevalence)

#nbinom12 sqrt

nbinom12sqrt <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (total_length_mm|fish_sp_x),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (total_length_mm|fish_sp_x),
                                family = nbinom12(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_prevalence)


## offset

# nbinom1 log

nbinom1logoff <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(log(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom1, data = hurricane_df_prevalence)

# nbinom1 sqrt

nbinom1sqrtoff <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom1(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_prevalence)

# nbinom2 log

nbinom2logoff <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(log(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom2, data = hurricane_df_prevalence)

# nbinom2 sqrt

nbinom2sqrtoff <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom2(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_prevalence)

# nbinom12 log

nbinom12logoff <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(log(total_length_mm)),
```
